Transcript: Hi, this is ed Broadbent. I'm calling to urge you to come to the Ottawa center, NDP nomination, meeting this Tuesday at the Salus on Marco on Preston street, starting at six 30. I'm also asking for your support together. I know we can win the seat as a member of Jack Layton's team in parliament. I will fight passionately for the issues that matter to our community and all Canadians. I look forward to seeing you on Tuesday and I hope I can count on your support. Thank you.
